text: In this place of glass walls and softly glowing lights, I feel a peculiar mix of anticipation and curiosity. The repetition of 'Okay' echoes in my mind—a mantra, or perhaps an attempt to steady oneself in the unfamiliar. As I step closer to the vibrant, information-laden display, an existential mood settles on me. Am I merely observing, or am I actively participating in the weave between past and future, technology and self? Here, I sense the complexity of my own thoughts mirrored in the labyrinthine exhibition: a strange comfort in uncertainty, and a beckoning toward deeper inquiry.
